title: porophyllum linaria
intro: Porophyllum linaria, also known as espinilla or crown flower, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and pungent, aromatic leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Porophyllum linaria include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
